mode.title: Mode
mode.description: The workflow mode used for the run.

resultType.title: Result type
resultType.description: The type of management result row.

threadId.title: Thread ID
threadId.description: The source buyer thread identifier when present.

threadUrl.title: Thread URL
threadUrl.description: Thread URL or stable deep link when known.

listingId.title: Listing ID
listingId.description: The source listing identifier when present.

buyerId.title: Buyer ID
buyerId.description: The buyer account identifier when available from a live seller-thread response.

listingTitle.title: Listing title
listingTitle.description: The listing related to the management action.

buyerIntent.title: Buyer intent
buyerIntent.description: Normalized buyer intent inferred from the last message or provided by input.

status.title: Thread or listing status
status.description: The current workflow status for the conversation or listing row.

lastMessageAt.title: Last message timestamp
lastMessageAt.description: ISO timestamp for the last known message when available.

daysSinceLastMessage.title: Days since last message
daysSinceLastMessage.description: Computed or supplied thread age in days.

lastMessage.title: Last message
lastMessage.description: Last buyer message used for inventory and reply decisions.

unreadCount.title: Unread count
unreadCount.description: Unread messages detected for the conversation when present.

liveFetchPage.title: Live fetch page
liveFetchPage.description: Pagination page number that produced the live seller-thread row.

followUpWindowReached.title: Follow-up window reached
followUpWindowReached.description: Whether the stale thread crossed the configured follow-up threshold.

dataOrigin.title: Data origin
dataOrigin.description: Whether the row came from the provided input payload or the built-in sample fallback.

priority.title: Priority
priority.description: Priority assigned to the management row.

replyDraft.title: Reply draft
replyDraft.description: Suggested seller reply text when generated.

reason.title: Reason
reason.description: Short explanation for the recommended action.
reason.example: Fresh buyer message with availability intent

sampleDataUsed.title: Sample data used
sampleDataUsed.description: Whether the actor used its built-in sample payload because the relevant inputs were empty.

hasRequiredCookies.title: Has required cookies
hasRequiredCookies.description: Whether the required Facebook cookies were present.

authProofLevel.title: Auth proof level
authProofLevel.description: How strong the session proof currently is. Cookie presence alone is weaker than a live seller-thread GraphQL fetch.

missingCookies.title: Missing cookies
missingCookies.description: Required cookie names that were not detected.

supportedWorkflows.title: Supported workflows
supportedWorkflows.description: Workflows that are fully proven. This remains empty in session_audit and is populated only after a live seller-thread fetch.

candidateWorkflows.title: Candidate workflows
candidateWorkflows.description: Workflows that the cookie artifact may support once a live browser session is verified.

workflowReadiness.title: Workflow readiness
workflowReadiness.description: Conservative readiness state for session-backed browser workflows.

fbDtsgSource.title: fb_dtsg source
fbDtsgSource.description: Where the live fetch obtained the Facebook fb_dtsg token.

browserProof.title: Browser proof
browserProof.description: Small same-layer proof from CDP mode, such as page title and visible Marketplace/Zimo markers.
